requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 and UNIT Conformity as the Technical Baseline for Uruguay BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619及UNIT合格评定作为乌拉圭BESS项目验收技术基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619及UNIT合格評定作為烏拉圭BESS項目驗收技術基準

summary.en: Uruguay's national standards body, UNIT (Instituto Uruguayo de Normas Técnicas), adopts IEC international standards as the basis for Uruguayan national standards where applicable. Uruguay does not currently have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation specifically governing stationary lithium battery energy storage systems for market access. However, IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules, and Uruguay project owners, EPCs, and UTE connection agreements are expected to reference IEC 62619 compliance as a technical prerequisite for project acceptance. URSEA, as the regulatory authority, may require conformity with IEC standards adopted by UNIT for energy storage equipment connected to the Uruguayan grid. Exporters should verify the current UNIT and URSEA requirements directly before shipment. Additionally, IEC 62133-2:2017 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries) and IEC 62619:2022 are the two key IEC safety standards relevant to lithium cells used in BESS applications, with IEC 62619 being the industrial-use-specific standard applicable to utility-scale BESS.
summary.zh: 乌拉圭国家标准机构UNIT（Instituto Uruguayo de Normas Técnicas）在适用情况下以IEC国际标准为基础制定乌拉圭国家标准。乌拉圭目前尚无经确认的专门针对固定式锂电池储能系统市场准入的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规。然而，IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准，乌拉圭项目业主、EPC承包商及UTE并网协议预计将以IEC 62619合规作为项目验收的技术前提。URSEA作为监管机构，可能要求接入乌拉圭电网的储能设备符合UNIT采纳的IEC标准。出口商在出货前应直接向UNIT和URSEA核实现行要求。此外，IEC 62133-2:2017（便携式密封二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）和IEC 62619:2022是与BESS应用中锂电芯相关的两项关键IEC安全标准，其中IEC 62619是专门适用于公用事业规模BESS的工业用途标准。
summary.zht: 烏拉圭國家標準機構UNIT（Instituto Uruguayo de Normas Técnicas）在適用情況下以IEC國際標準為基礎制定烏拉圭國家標準。烏拉圭目前尚無經確認的專門針對固定式鋰電池儲能系統市場准入的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規。然而，IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準，烏拉圭項目業主、EPC承包商及UTE併網協議預計將以IEC 62619合規作為項目驗收的技術前提。URSEA作為監管機構，可能要求接入烏拉圭電網的儲能設備符合UNIT採納的IEC標準。出口商在出貨前應直接向UNIT和URSEA核實現行要求。此外，IEC 62133-2:2017（便攜式密封二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）和IEC 62619:2022是與BESS應用中鋰電芯相關的兩項關鍵IEC安全標準，其中IEC 62619是專門適用於公用事業規模BESS的工業用途標準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Uruguay project specifications; adopted by UNIT as basis for applicable Uruguayan standards)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard referenced in project specifications)

IEC 62133-2:2017 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries (complementary cell-level standard)
UNIT (Instituto Uruguayo de Normas Técnicas) — Uruguayan national standards body adopting IEC standards (verify current mandatory BESS-specific requirement directly with UNIT and URSEA)
URSEA (Unidad Reguladora de Servicios de Energía y Agua) — regulatory authority; may require conformity with IEC standards for grid-connected BESS equipment

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as equivalents in Uruguay project specifications where IEC 62619 evidence is required. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance, for cells and modules supplied to Uruguay BESS projects.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准未与IEC 62619协调，在乌拉圭项目规格要求IEC 62619证据的情况下，不被接受为等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至乌拉圭BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準未與IEC 62619協調，在烏拉圭項目規格要求IEC 62619證據的情況下，不被接受為等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至烏拉圭BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: Uruguay project owners and UTE connection agreements are expected to reference IEC 62619 as the technical safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. UNIT's adoption of IEC standards as the national conformity baseline means IEC 62619 is the de facto technical gate for BESS cell and module safety in Uruguay. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications. Exporters should: (a) verify the current UNIT and URSEA requirements for any mandatory pre-shipment or grid-connection conformity obligation specific to stationary BESS; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Uruguay BESS projects; (c) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification or UTE connection agreement before committing to a test programme.
gap.zh: 关键差距：乌拉圭项目业主和UTE并网协议预计将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的技术安全证据。UNIT以IEC标准作为国家合格评定基准，意味着IEC 62619是乌拉圭BESS电芯和模组安全的事实上的技术门槛。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被项目技术规格接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）核实UNIT和URSEA现行要求，确认是否存在针对固定式BESS的强制装运前或并网合格义务；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至乌拉圭BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格或UTE并网协议中引用的IEC 62619版本。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：烏拉圭項目業主和UTE併網協議預計將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的技術安全證據。UNIT以IEC標準作為國家合格評定基準，意味著IEC 62619是烏拉圭BESS電芯和模組安全的事實上的技術門檻。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被項目技術規格接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）核實UNIT和URSEA現行要求，確認是否存在針對固定式BESS的強制裝運前或併網合格義務；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至烏拉圭BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格或UTE併網協議中引用的IEC 62619版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where UTE or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; standalone mandatory regulatory obligation for BESS market access has not been confirmed from official Uruguayan sources as of dataset date — verify directly with UNIT and URSEA
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

source.publisher: International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC) — IEC 62619:2022; adopted by UNIT as basis for Uruguayan national conformity

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Uruguay as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Uruguay project specifications and UTE connection agreements, given UNIT's IEC-based conformity framework. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Uruguay project acceptance where IEC 62619 evidence is required. Verify UNIT and URSEA current requirements and confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner, UTE, and any appointed conformity assessment body before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，乌拉圭尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，鉴于UNIT基于IEC的合格评定框架，IEC 62619是乌拉圭项目规格和UTE并网协议中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足乌拉圭项目要求IEC 62619证据时的项目验收要求。出货前请核实UNIT和URSEA现行要求，并向项目业主、UTE及任何指定合格评定机构确认IEC 62619证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，烏拉圭尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，鑑於UNIT基於IEC的合格評定框架，IEC 62619是烏拉圭項目規格和UTE併網協議中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足烏拉圭項目要求IEC 62619證據時的項目驗收要求。出貨前請核實UNIT和URSEA現行要求，並向項目業主、UTE及任何指定合格評定機構確認IEC 62619證據要求。
